title: GainWix.ai
description: Designed and developed a 15-page AI-powered SaaS website for GainWix — a WhatsApp automation platform for sales, marketing & support.
longDescription:
Designed and developed the complete marketing website for GainWix.ai, an AI-powered WhatsApp automation platform that helps businesses automate sales, marketing, and customer support through WhatsApp.

Built from the ground up in Framer, the site features a premium dark-themed UI with glassmorphism effects, gradient overlays, smooth scroll-triggered animations, and a fully responsive design system. The project spans 15 pages including the homepage, 6 industry-specific solution pages (Creator, Education, Real Estate, Healthcare, Travel Agency, Logistics & Shipping), a pricing page, a blog with multiple articles, and legal pages — all designed to convert visitors into leads.
highlights: 15-page production website built entirely in Framer
6 industry-specific solution pages with custom layouts
Dark-themed UI with glassmorphism & gradient effects
Fully responsive across mobile, tablet & desktop
Blog system with article pages & SEO optimization
